message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

content.text: Let me read the file to see the current log message at line 424.
Let me see more context to understand what information is available.
The log at line 424 is hit when both JWT and session auth return no user and no error. Adding the request method, path, and remote address will help diagnose which requests are failing.

input.new_string: cclog.Infof("auth -> authentication failed: no valid session or JWT for %s %s from %s", r.Method, r.URL.Path, r.RemoteAddr)
